title: Base
description: Provide shared utilities, helpers, and test support used by other plugins.

SNAP_DIR.description: Base snapshot directory for per-snapshot hook output

CRAWL_DIR.description: Base crawl directory for per-crawl hook output

LIB_DIR.description: Shared tools and binary installation root

EXTRA_CONTEXT.description: JSON object merged into emitted JSONL event records

TIMEOUT.description: Default timeout in seconds for hooks that support a TIMEOUT fallback

USER_AGENT.description: Default user agent string for HTTP requests and browser automation

SNAPSHOT_DEPTH.description: Current crawl depth override for discovery hooks

NODE_V8_COVERAGE.description: Optional V8 coverage output directory for Node.js hooks

CHROME_BINARY.description: Resolved Chromium/Chrome binary path shared across plugins

CHROME_USER_DATA_DIR.description: Chrome user data directory for persistent browser state

CHROME_DOWNLOADS_DIR.description: Chrome downloads directory shared by browser plugins

CHROME_EXTENSIONS_DIR.description: Chrome extensions directory shared by browser plugins
